prompt: Two powerful fantasy women standing back-to-back in the center of a vast cherry blossom field at dusk, full-body heroic composition, seen from a slightly low angle, ultra-detailed cinematic anime-realism. The woman on the left has {argument name="left character hair color" default="vivid crimson red"} short layered hair, a curvy athletic build, and a fierce dominant presence; she wears a black and dark red strappy battle outfit with a cropped leather top, high-cut bottoms, garter-like thigh straps, flowing translucent red ribbons, and long glossy black armguards. The woman on the right has {argument name="right character hair color" default="golden blonde with soft pink ends"} wavy shoulder-length hair, an athletic curvy build, and extensive floral tattoo sleeves and body tattoos across her arm, shoulder, ribs, and thigh; she wears a black and purple strappy fantasy outfit with sheer purple fabric panels, chain accents, and black gloves. Their bare upper backs press together as they face opposite directions with calm, intimidating confidence. There are exactly 2 massive glowing energy swords planted upright in the ground behind and beside them: 1 on the left radiating molten red-orange fire and ember-like cracks, and 1 on the right radiating electric violet and cyan energy with lightning coursing through the blade. The scene is set in a breathtaking sakura landscape with dense pink cherry trees, countless petals swirling violently through the air, a dramatic sunset sky filled with magenta, purple, and orange clouds, distant lightning, and a glowing horizon over a Japanese-inspired cityscape with a pagoda visible on the right. Emphasize raw power, sensual elegance, high contrast rim lighting, wind-blown fabric and hair, luminous particle effects, rich red-versus-purple color contrast, epic fantasy atmosphere, hyper-detailed rendering, sharp focus on the two women, and painterly cinematic depth.
translatedPrompt: 两位强大的奇幻女性在黄昏时分广阔的樱花林中央背靠背站立，全身英雄构图，采用略微仰视的视角，呈现超精细的电影级动漫写实风格。左侧女性拥有 {argument name="left character hair color" default="鲜艳的深红色"} 短层叠发型，身材曲线健美，气场强悍霸气；她身穿黑色与深红色绑带战斗服，搭配短款皮质上衣、高叉下装、类似吊带袜的大腿绑带、飘逸的半透明红色丝带以及长款亮面黑色护臂。右侧女性拥有 {argument name="right character hair color" default="金发配柔和粉色发梢"} 的波浪形齐肩发，身材曲线健美，手臂、肩膀、肋骨和大腿上布满了大面积的花卉纹身；她身穿黑色与紫色绑带奇幻服装，带有透明的紫色布料拼接、链条装饰和黑色手套。她们赤裸的后背紧紧相贴，面朝相反方向，展现出冷静而令人敬畏的自信。她们身后和身侧的地面上插着 2 把巨大的发光能量剑：左侧的一把散发着熔岩般的红橙色火焰和类似余烬的裂纹，右侧的一把散发着电光紫和青色的能量，剑身上闪烁着雷电。场景设定在令人惊叹的樱花景观中，茂密的粉色樱花树，无数花瓣在空中剧烈旋舞，戏剧性的日落天空布满了洋红色、紫色和橙色的云彩，远处有闪电，地平线上隐约可见带有宝塔的日式城市景观。强调原始力量、感性优雅、高对比度的轮廓光、随风飘动的布料和头发、发光的粒子特效、浓郁的红紫色彩对比、史诗般的奇幻氛围、超精细渲染、对两位女性的清晰对焦以及绘画般的电影深度。

breakdown.creativeCore: 樱花暮色下的背靠背海妖：一幅电影质感的奇幻艺术作品，描绘了两名背靠背站立在日落樱花林中的纹身女战士，手持两把发光的能量剑，非常适合用于戏剧性的角色艺术和海报风格的英雄形象设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, layered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
